title: bidens odorata var. rosea
intro: Bidens odorata var. rosea, also known as Bidens rosea or Rosy Beggar-ticks, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The Bidens rosea plant has been used to promote overall health and wellness, with potential health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and relief from colds and fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
